page_content:
DANC319 Modern Dance IV (3 Credits)

Continuation of the elements addressed in DANC318 with an added focus on movement subtlety and complexity, and stylistic demands. Prerequisite: DANC318.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Dance department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

DANC328 Ballet III (2 Credits)

Execution of the vocabulary of ballet movement with technical accuracy. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.
